name: Spaghetti Squash Florentine
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Tomato sauce, no salt added
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the spinach and squeeze it dry. Set aside.
2. Wash the spaghetti squash; cut it in half lengthwise.
3. Remove and discard the seeds.
4. Place the squash, cut side down, in a Dutch oven. Add water to a depth of 2 inches.
5. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
6. Drain the squash and cool it.
7. Using a fork, remove spaghetti-like strands from the squash and discard the shells.
8. Place the strands in a 9x13-inch pan coated with cooking spray.
9. Combine the spinach, ricotta cheese, eggs, and seasonings. Beat at medium speed of a mixer until blended.
10. Spread over the squash.
11. Top with tomato sauce; sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
12. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. (6 servings, 198 calories per serving)
